options.content:
## AI Decision Flow
- Signals aggregated -> confidence computed -> compare to threshold.
- Default threshold: **0.7** (configurable via --ai-confidence-threshold).
- If **dry_run=true** => log only.
- If confidence < threshold => no block, counted as below_threshold.
- Reasons include top signals and confidence vs threshold.
- See action breakdown and confidence buckets to understand outcomes.

targets.query: SELECT last("gauge") FROM "packetyeeter_ai_confidence_threshold" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT max("counter") - min("counter") FROM "packetyeeter_ai_detections_action_total" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "action"
SELECT max("counter") - min("counter") FROM "packetyeeter_ai_detection_confidence_bucket" WHERE time > now()-1h GROUP BY "le"
SELECT non_negative_derivative(max("counter"),1s) FROM "packetyeeter_ai_blocks_by_signal_total" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "signal" fill(null)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(sum("counter"),1s) FROM "packetyeeter_ja4db_lookups_by_type_total" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "type" fill(null)
